allow: Bash(node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\);process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{const r=JSON.parse\(d\);for\(const f of r\){const m=f.messages.filter\(x=>x.severity===2\);if\(m.length\){console.log\(f.filePath\);for\(const x of m\)console.log\('  '+x.line+':'+x.column+' '+x.ruleId\)}}}\)")
